summary: Both bug fixes VERIFIED WORKING: 1) Bank USED now correctly shows 54,990 PRC (counting all bank transactions including 'Paid' status without date filter). 2) 7-day cooling period is working - blocks requests within 7 days with correct error message mentioning 'week' and '7 days'.
critical_code_review_comments: Bank category calculation (redeem_categories.py lines 266-364) correctly removes date filter and counts ALL bank transactions
'Paid' status is included in success_statuses list (line 117)
7-day cooling period (manual_bank_transfer.py lines 350-424) correctly checks BOTH bank_withdrawal_requests AND redeem_requests collections
Cooling period error message correctly mentions 'ONE per week' and '7 days' (not 24 hours)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both fixes verified working. Bank USED = 54,990 PRC (correct). 7-day cooling period blocks with message 'Bank transfer is limited to ONE per week. Please wait 7 days before requesting another bank transfer.'

fix_1_bank_used_calculation.details: Bank category now counts ALL bank transactions without date filter, including 'Paid' status

fix_2_seven_day_cooling_period.error_message: Bank transfer is limited to ONE per week. Please wait 7 days before requesting another bank transfer.
fix_2_seven_day_cooling_period.details: Cooling period correctly checks BOTH bank_withdrawal_requests AND redeem_requests collections

tests_executed.test_bank_category_no_date_filter: PASS - Consistent results without date filter
